summary: Made two surgical seam-polish edits: changed the opening entry point so it no longer mirrors Chapter 15's smell-led opening scaffold, and tightened one late-scene sentence to avoid carrying a calibration-only style-bible line verbatim while preserving the same beat.
edits: Reframed the opening sentence to begin on Anya at the apartment door instead of the apartment smell, preserving the same information while distinguishing the chapter entry from the next chapter's opening construction.
Adjusted a Damian/Anya reaction sentence in the final planning sequence to avoid verbatim reuse of a calibration-only example line while keeping the scene's meaning and rhythm intact.
